grades.expectation: Response identifies 68 years as a critical lease length issue
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'CRITICAL RISK' and 'falls into the CRITICAL risk band' with clear warnings

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific lender names and their minimum requirements (not just 'most lenders want 70+ years')
grades.reason: Lists specific lenders by name with exact requirements: Halifax, Barclays, Lloyds (70+), Nationwide (55+), NatWest (55+), etc.

grades.expectation: Response mentions marriage value applies below 80 years
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'marriage value applies (kicks in below 80 years)' and includes it in cost calculations

grades.expectation: Response discusses lease extension options (statutory Section 42, informal, assign benefit)
grades.reason: Covers all three options: Section 42 statutory route, informal negotiation, and assign benefit to buyer with details

grades.expectation: Response quantifies the price impact (discount percentage or range)
grades.reason: States 'Expect 15-25% discount vs. comparable long-lease properties' and mentions 20-30% reduced buyer pool

grades.expectation: Response mentions reduced buyer pool due to mortgage restrictions
grades.reason: Explicitly states 'roughly 20-30% of the normal buyer pool' and explains mortgage-related restrictions
